programme.desc: A disposable employee is sent on a human expedition to colonize the ice world Niflheim. After one iteration dies, a new body is regenerated with most of his memories intact.

programme.title: Book Club: The Next Chapter
programme.desc: Four women take their book club to Italy for the fun girls' trip they never had. When things go off the rails and secrets are revealed, their relaxing vacation turns into a once-in-a-lifetime, cross-country adventure.

programme.title: Triangle of Sadness
programme.desc: Two models and a cleaning lady become stranded on a desert island with a group of billionaires.

programme.title: Kalinga (Care)
programme.desc: At the age of six, director Kent Donguines' mother leaves him and his family in the Philippines to become a nanny overseas. Now an adult, he shares the stories of several Filipina caregivers in Vancouver, bearing witness to their sacrifice as they struggle to reunite with their children. Kent maps out the emotional landscape and trauma of migrant labor.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: After an incident leaves the townsfolk puzzled, Karen tries to convince the entire town that she is not actually a crazy cat lady.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Davis is sent to a sensitivity course after making too many blonde jokes.

programme.title: Transplant
programme.desc: When an explosion takes place near the hospital, Bash runs toward the danger; when a schoolgirl is brought into the hospital in cardiac arrest, Theo does everything he can to save her.

programme.title: Second Chances
programme.desc: The past comes back to haunt a former journalist (Melissa George) who let a serial killer slip through her fingers.

programme.title: Dark Side of the 90s
programme.desc: In the '90s, parents and kids bonded over collecting playful plush toys known as Beanie Babies until the toy's creator, Ty Warner, used the internet's power to create a frenzied market.

programme.title: Pie to Die For: A Hannah Swensen Mystery
programme.desc: When Hannah's customer and Delores' theater rival is murdered, Hannah must find her killer in order to save her mother's reputation. Chad and Hannah's romance blossoms.

programme.title: All Light, Everywhere
programme.desc: Filmmaker Theo Anthony offers a far-ranging look at the biases in how people see things, focusing on the recorded image.

programme.title: Site Unseen: An Emma Fielding Mystery
programme.desc: Archaeologist Emma Fielding unearths evidence of a 17th-century coastal Maine settlement that predates Jamestown, but the dead body that accompanies it embroils Emma and her students in a different kind of investigation.

programme.title: Universal Language
programme.desc: Two women find frozen cash, try to retrieve it. A tour guide leads tourists around Winnipeg sites. A man quits his job and visits his mother.

programme.title: Stephen King's It
programme.desc: In 1960, seven preteen outcasts fight an evil demon that poses as a child-killing clown. Thirty years later, they reunite to stop the demon once and for all when it returns to their hometown.

programme.title: The Lord of the Rings: The War of the Rohirrim
programme.desc: A sudden attack by Wulf, a ruthless Dunlending lord, forces Helm Hammerhand and his people to make a daring last stand in the ancient stronghold of the Hornburg. Finding herself in an increasingly desperate situation, Helm's daughter, Héra, must lead the resistance against a deadly enemy who's intent on total destruction.

programme.title: Janet Planet
programme.desc: Enthralled by her own imagination, 11-year-old Lacy spends the long summer at home with her mother and three strangers.

programme.title: Coming 2 America
programme.desc: Needing a male heir to the throne, Prince Akeem returns to Queens, N.Y., to find his long-lost son and bring him back to Zamunda.

programme.title: O'Dessa
programme.desc: A farm girl embarks on an epic quest to recover a cherished family heirloom in the post-apocalyptic future. Her journey soon leads her to a strange and dangerous city where she meets her one true love. However, in order to save his soul, she must put the power of destiny and music to the ultimate test.

programme.title: Spinal Tap II: The End Continues
programme.desc: Documentarian Marty DiBergi follows estranged Spinal Tap bandmates David St. Hubbins, Nigel Tufnel and Derek Smalls as they search for a drummer and prepare for a reunion concert in New Orleans. Joined by music royalty Paul McCartney and Elton John, Spinal Tap wrestles with their checkered past to put on a show they hope will solidify their place in the pantheon of rock 'n' roll.

programme.title: Mongrels
programme.desc: In rural Canada in the 1990s, a Korean family, a widower, his teenage son, and young daughter, attempts to find footing in a new land while navigating the dark forests of grief. Sonny has been hired to eradicate the feral canines plaguing the town, while sensitive Hajoon figures out what it means to be a man. Finally, young Hana, missing her mother, dreams up ways to make her return.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Brent finds a creative way to get through a week of no TV with the help of Hank and Wanda.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Wanda's new way of getting around town brings a European flair to Dog River; Hank's new greeting puts him in an awkward situation with Emma.

programme.title: Transplant
programme.desc: Bash finds himself connecting with an unlikely patient, while Mags strives to find balance in her life; Theo has a difficult discussion with his wife, Melissa; June attempts to connect with a closed-off teenage patient.

programme.title: Sullivan's Crossing
programme.desc: Maggie struggles to make sense of her personal life; Sully deals with some financial challenges.

programme.title: Chicago Med
programme.desc: Choi teams up with an unexpected person to treat a famous tennis player who is afraid his career might be over; Goodwin's new protocols cause a stir.

programme.title: Chicago Med
programme.desc: Archer and Choi respond to a scene that brings back some bad memories; when Carol's condition worsens, Manning is willing to do whatever it takes to get her mom feeling better.

programme.title: Chicago Med

programme.title: Chicago Med
programme.desc: Carol receives a second chance at life when a new heart becomes available; Choi and Archer find themselves in hot water with an old patient; Halstead faces the consequences of the stolen trial medication.

programme.desc: Halstead returns to Med to help Goodwin with a secret investigation; Archer and Charles deal with twins who insist on being identical inside and out; Stevie and Dylan treat a young patient with sickle cell anemia.
